bestsellers.title: Spring Elegance
bestsellers.desc: A delicate blend of peonies, tulips, and roses — perfect for springtime gifting.
bestsellers.longDesc: Each stem is carefully selected to create a bouquet that radiates freshness, elegance, and the gentle charm of spring. Whether you're celebrating a birthday, sending love, or simply brightening someone's day, this arrangement is sure to bring warm smiles and lasting impressions.

bestsellers.title: Berry Chic
bestsellers.desc: A stylish composition of roses, greenery, and vibrant berries — bold and elegant.
bestsellers.longDesc: This bold arrangement combines deep red roses with fresh greenery and vibrant berries. Perfect for those who appreciate dramatic floral design. The rich colors and textures create a statement piece that will be remembered.

bestsellers.title: Lavender Dream
bestsellers.desc: A rich bouquet with lavender, lisianthus, and roses — deep hues and gentle fragrance.
bestsellers.longDesc: Immerse yourself in the soothing beauty of lavender and lisianthus. This romantic arrangement features deep purple hues and delicate roses, creating a dreamy atmosphere perfect for anniversaries or just because.

feedbacks.text: Flora made my anniversary unforgettable with their beautiful arrangement!
feedbacks.author: Emma T.

feedbacks.text: The service was exceptional, and the flowers were fresh!
feedbacks.author: Olivia M.

feedbacks.text: Absolutely stunning bouquet! It looked even better than the photo.
feedbacks.author: Daniel R.

feedbacks.text: Fast delivery and the bouquet smelled amazing. Highly recommend Flora!
feedbacks.author: Sophia L.

feedbacks.text: Beautifully arranged flowers that lasted over a week. Great quality!
feedbacks.author: Michael B.

feedbacks.text: Perfect gift for my mom’s birthday. She was thrilled!
feedbacks.author: Hannah W.

feedbacks.text: Great customer service and gorgeous flowers. Will order again!
feedbacks.author: Lucas P.
